title: Fix portal mode routing and duplicate streamed output
description: Normal chat shows duplicate assistant output, research routes to an unimplemented stub, and /portal/code appears to render the wrong code-mode UI/session path.
close_reason: Fixed duplicate streamed assistant bubble, routed research through streaming, routed /portal/code to full TeamPortal, and replaced code session stubs with public Convex session helpers; build/type-check pass.

title: Fix existing lint baseline failures
description: bun run lint currently fails on pre-existing repository issues unrelated to the thinking-panel/chat changes. Examples include unused imports in CreditModal/MathRenderer/OnboardingModal, React hook compiler findings in QEMUScreen/VMScreen/TeamPortal/use-mobile, and generated Convex eslint-disable warnings. Type-check and production build pass.

title: Restore full Code Mode agent pipeline
description: The UI no longer throws on session creation, but the full multi-agent backend actions are still absent. Implement real runAgentRound/startBackgroundSession behavior instead of the minimal session-ready placeholder.

title: Make desktop Study Mode stream responses
description: Study Mode currently uses a blocking study action on desktop while chat streams immediately. Route desktop study sends through streaming and keep study action as fallback.
close_reason: Desktop Study Mode now uses the streaming chat path first, with study action fallback; build/type-check and targeted lint passed.

title: Fix Study Mode duplicate send and stalled replies
close_reason: Fixed Study Mode duplicate user-message save path and preserved assistant response persistence; build/type-check pass.

title: Clean up existing repo-wide lint failures
description: bun run lint currently fails on existing issues across qemu-bridge and src, including no-explicit-any, unused variables, React hook lint rules, and fast-refresh warnings. This was observed while verifying the installer bridge fix and is unrelated to the touched files.

title: Clean up existing lint violations
description: Repo-wide lint currently fails on pre-existing unused variables, purity errors, and no-useless-escape issues. This blocked using lint as a passing quality gate after the GitHub sync fallback change.

title: Rebuild and publish VM installer after installer bridge fixes
description: installer.js now fixes Windows/macOS auto-download entries, HTA scrollbar behavior, Install POST error handling, and hidden bridge logging. The app still points at the existing released v4.3.0 installer binary, so the installer artifact must be rebuilt and published by the platform-managed release flow.
